name: pandadoc
description: Reads and writes documented PandaDoc public API resources across documents, templates, contacts, folders, forms, logs, members, webhooks, workspaces, notary, and catalog surfaces.

risk.read: external PandaDoc API read of document, template, contact, member, workspace, webhook, notary, and catalog data
risk.write: external PandaDoc API mutations including document sending/status changes, contact/template/folder/webhook/admin updates, and destructive deletes
risk.approval: required for write actions; destructive and notification-sending actions carry explicit risk metadata
